text:
Once upon a time in a quaint village nestled between mountains bordering a enchanted forest...

There lived an elderly fox named Oliver.

One autumn evening, Oliver discovered an ancient tome hidden amongst owl feathers in an abandoned owl nesting cavity.

Hidden from eyesights Owls wore.

This tome told stories of creatures that roamed the forests trees.

Oliver read aboutelves who sang.

He imagined an entire forest waking up to songs.

He realized Owls were singing,

And trees were probably singing.

Night after night Olivo listened to that.

Eventually he fell asleep dreaming.

Dreams...

elves with tails.

elves singing birds.

He dreamed about singing trees.

The trees couldncertovoltovoltowlovovolistowlOVOVOVOI!

They talked!

They danced!

They sang!

The universe oozed joy.

Olivo woke refreshed.

He danced.

That night.

elves danced.

That night owls swooped.

But Owls weren't birds...

Oh Owls... you're impossible...
